name_en: M13679 Blue Denim Cherry Blossom 🍒. This Venice backpack is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, incorporating personalized cherry embroidery into the Monogram denim canvas, vividly interpreting the artist's colorful whimsy. Refined leather outlines the slender straps, and bright buckles accent the flap and exterior pocket. Dimensions: 24*7*26cm. (Excludes doll)
